title: miliusa thailandica
intro: Miliusa thailandica, also known as the Thai Miliusa, is a species of flowering plant in the family Annonaceae. It is native to Thailand and is valued for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant compounds. The plant has been traditionally used to treat various health issues, including fever, cough, and digestive problems, and its health benefits include reducing inflammation, improving respiratory health, and boosting the immune system. Miliusa thailandica can be prepared as an herbal tea, infusion, or decoction, and its extracts have been used in traditional medicine for their potential health benefits.
